reviews.comment:
Pasamos a cargar combustible ya que estábamos de vacaciones y cuando le preguntamos al playero por los baños nos dijo que de noche estaban  cerrados ,cuándo es un servicio que deben brindar .

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to refuel since we were on vacation, and when we asked the attendant about the restrooms, he told us they were closed at night, even though it's a service they're supposed to provide.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBbXZ1NlFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Hay variedad de productos y promociones para tomar café
La zona en la que está ubicada es en pleno centro de Villa
Fui cerca de las 20.00 hs y me atendió una piba que se llama “Flor” la cual me pareció una ordinaria e irrespetuosa a la hora de tomarme el pedido.
Por eso solo pongo 3 estrellas
El local estaba limpio

(Translated by Google)
There's a variety of products and promotions for coffee.
It's located right in the center of Villa.
I went around 8:00 PM and was served by a girl named "Flor," who I found rude and disrespectful when taking my order.
That's why I'm only giving it 3 stars.
The place was clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfMDluT0pBEAE
